name: leet-cli
description: Browse bundled LeetCode company lists (uber, nvidia, ...) from the terminal, with optional live refresh from LeetCode's public GraphQL.

scripts.build:data: bun run scripts/build-data.ts && bun run scripts/gen-embed.ts
scripts.compile: bun run scripts/gen-embed.ts && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile leet
